---
title: "How to do exponential fits"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{expfit}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
suppressMessages(library(ephys4))
theme_set( cowplot::theme_cowplot() )
```


```{r}
testdata <-
   read_PATCHMASTER(ephysdata::examplefile("NaV"), ser=2) %>% tail(1) 

testdata %>% ggsweeps()
```


```{r}
EXPFIT <-
  testdata %>%
    add_cursor_expfit("expfit", 
                      start= 0.011, 
                      end = 0.03
                      ) 

EXPFIT %>% ggsweeps() 

```

```{r}
EXPFIT %>% 
  select(expfit) %>% 
  tidyr::unnest_wider(expfit, names_sep = "~")
```
